stan.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view of a 'stan' archetype — a young man in a sleeveless white tank top (wifebeater outline visible against the black body silhouette), holding a folded letter up near his chest in one hand. The figure has short bleached-blonde hair on top of the head, rendered as bright glowing platinum-gold spikes/peach-fuzz. The bleach-blonde hair itself IS the at-a-glance identifier and is the bright accent. Body is otherwise pure black silhouette. No hat.

farmer.silhouette: Chest-up view rendered as a MONKEY (chimpanzee) — a hunched faceless monkey/ape silhouette seated at a desk, leaning forward over a row of THREE phones lined up side-by-side on the desk. Clear primate silhouette: rounded ape skull, prominent brow ridge, longer arms, hunched primate shoulders, no clothing or just a plain bare body outline. Both hairy monkey hands hover over the phones, fingers poised to tap. The three phone screens all glow brighter, casting upward light onto the underside of the monkey's chin. The cluster of glowing phone screens is the at-a-glance identifier.

teen.silhouette: Chest-up view rendered as a CHUBBY CARTOON BABY for goofy/juvenile effect — oversized round bald head, tiny rounded shoulders, the silhouette obviously infantile and exaggerated like a comic-strip baby. On top of the head: a small propeller-beanie hat (knit beanie with a stick rising from the top and a three-bladed propeller spinning at the end), motion-blur lines indicating the propeller is spinning. Pacifier silhouette in the mouth area. The spinning propeller blades and motion-blur arcs glow brighter as the at-a-glance identifier.

thirst.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view — a young goth woman with sharp asymmetric emo bangs falling across one eye, long swooping black hair, a thick black choker visible at the neck. Head tilted slightly, lips pursed blowing a kiss to the side. A small heart shape floats from her lips outward — the heart is the at-a-glance identifier and the bright accent.

zealot.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view — a figure in a hooded cowl with one fist raised high above the head in a militant gesture. The silhouette of the raised clenched fist breaks the upper part of the circle's negative space and is the at-a-glance identifier. A single tiny burning ember (eye or torch) glows brighter against the wash. Hood low over the face, no facial features.

hustler.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view of a modern podcaster/grifter — slicked-back hair (no hat of any kind), wearing a headset with a boom microphone curving in front of the mouth, one hand raised in front in an open-palm 'trust me' pitch gesture. The headset boom mic + open pitch hand is the at-a-glance identifier. The tip of the microphone glows brighter as the bright accent.

doomer.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view — a figure in a slouched pulled-down knit beanie, shoulders hunched forward, head tilted down, the silhouette reading as collapsed and weary. A lit cigarette dangles from where the mouth would be; the cigarette's ember glows brighter with a faint curl of smoke rising. The hunched silhouette + glowing ember is the at-a-glance identifier.

bot.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view — a boxy mechanical robot, rectangular blocky head (not round), rigid angular shoulders, no organic curves anywhere, faint mechanical seam lines suggested but not detailed. A single round camera-lens eye in the center of the rectangular head glows brighter. On top of the head, a small antenna with a tiny sphere on top. The boxy mechanical head + single glowing lens is the at-a-glance identifier. Distinctly non-human silhouette.

normal.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view — a perfectly average plain figure, basic short hair, plain t-shirt or simple sweater. Holding a coffee mug with both hands at chest height, the mug's open top facing the viewer. A gentle curl of steam rises from the mug. The mug's interior and the rising steam glow warm. The mug + relaxed posture is the at-a-glance identifier.

teen+zealot.wash: dingy olive-red, like rust over damp moss
teen+zealot.silhouette: Chest-up view rendered as a CHUBBY CARTOON BABY (carrying the teen archetype's baby motif) — oversized round bald head, tiny rounded shoulders, infantile exaggerated proportions. On top of the head: a propeller-beanie with a slowly spinning three-bladed propeller, motion-blur lines around it. The baby has one tiny clenched fist raised militantly straight up above its head (the zealot pose). A pacifier hangs partly out of its mouth in defiance. One small eye visible in the silhouette glows fiery blood-red as the bright accent. The baby silhouette + tiny raised fist + glowing red eye is the at-a-glance identifier — juvenile rage.
